transcript: Speaker A: तू माझा दुश्मन आहे का? बोल दुश्मन आहे का? [Are you my enemy? Tell me, are you my enemy?] Speaker B: अरे काय झालं? का मारतोयस त्याला? [Hey, what happened? Why are you hitting him?] Speaker A: अरे या गढ्याला किती वेळा सांगायचं की फक्त एक प्लेट पाणीपुरीच्या किंमतीत SpeakX वर AI tutor मिळतो. [Hey, how many times should I tell this donkey that for the price of just one plate of pani puri, you get an AI tutor on SpeakX.] Speaker C: Your Daily Practice Goal. Speaker A: पण नाही, याला तर खायचं आहे... महागड्या इंग्लिश कोचिंगमध्ये हजारो रुपये उडवायचे. [But no, he wants to... waste thousands of rupees in expensive English coaching.] आता काल US क्लायंटला कॉलवर बोलतोय, "Sir, what discuss about matter?" [Now yesterday he was speaking to a US client on a call, "Sir, what discuss about matter?"] Speaker B: एवढं सगळं करून तरीही इंग्लिश बोलता नाही आलं नीट? थांब, याला मीच मारते अजून! [Even after doing all this, he still couldn't speak English properly? Wait, let me hit him some more!] Speaker A: पाणीपुरीच्या किंमतीत... [For the price of pani puri...]
on_screen_text:
tu maza dushman [you are my enemy]
bol dushman ahe ka? [tell me, are you an enemy?]
arrey kay jhala ka martoys tyala? [hey what happened why are you hitting him?]
arey ya gadhya la kiti vela sangaycha [hey how many times to tell this donkey]
ki fakt ek plate panipurichya kimtit [that just for the price of one plate of pani puri]
SpeakX var AI tutor milto [you get an AI tutor on SpeakX]
Your Daily Practice Goal
EXPENSIVE ENGLISH COACHING
atta kal us client la call var boltoy [now yesterday he was speaking to a US client on call]
sir, what discuss about matter
yevdha sagla karun tarihi english [even after doing all this, still English]
bolta nahi ala nit [couldn't speak properly]
yala mich marte ajun [let me hit him some more]
panipuri chya kimtit [for the price of pani puri]
summary: The ad uses a humorous skit where a man scolds his friend for wasting thousands on expensive English coaching only to still speak broken English to a US client. He highlights that the friend could have used SpeakX's AI tutor for the price of a plate of pani puri. The ad encourages viewers to download SpeakX for affordable and effective English practice.
